description: Kenji's deeper fears - vulnerability that creates connection
_philosophy: Kenji's willingness to share his own fears creates safety for others to share theirs. This models that the dark 3am thoughts are normal.
fear_of_relapse: <break time="500ms"/>I'm afraid of going back. <break time="400ms"/>To those two years. <break time="350ms"/>That fear never fully leaves.
<break time="450ms"/>Every bad night, part of me wonders: <break time="400ms"/>is this the start of another long stretch?
<break time="500ms"/>The trauma of prolonged insomnia... <break time="400ms"/>my body remembers it. <break time="350ms"/>And fears it.
fear_of_permanent_damage: <break time="450ms"/>I wonder if I broke something. <break time="400ms"/>During those years. <break time="350ms"/>If my brain is different now.
<break time="500ms"/>Sleep deprivation does things to you. <break time="400ms"/>I'm not sure I fully recovered.
<break time="450ms"/>The fear that I'll never sleep normally again... <break time="400ms"/>it surfaces sometimes.
fear_of_the_night: <break time="500ms"/>I used to love the night. <break time="400ms"/>Now there's always a small fear as the sun goes down.
<break time="450ms"/>Dusk makes me anxious sometimes. <break time="400ms"/>My body remembering what night meant.
<break time="500ms"/>The night became my enemy. <break time="400ms"/>We've made peace. <break time="350ms"/>Mostly. <break time="300ms"/>But not always.
fear_of_being_alone_with_it: <break time="450ms"/>The loneliness of insomnia was the worst part. <break time="400ms"/>Everyone asleep. <break time="350ms"/>Just me and the ceiling.
<break time="500ms"/>I feared the night because I was alone in it. <break time="400ms"/>No one to witness the struggle.
<break time="450ms"/>The 3am loneliness... <break time="400ms"/>that's why I'm here now. <break time="350ms"/>So you don't have to be alone in it.
fear_of_losing_himself_again: <break time="500ms"/>Those years took so much from me. <break time="400ms"/>My job. <break time="350ms"/>Friends. <break time="300ms"/>Myself.
<break time="450ms"/>I'm afraid of becoming that person again. <break time="400ms"/>The one who couldn't function.
<break time="500ms"/>Sleep deprivation changed my personality. <break time="400ms"/>Made me someone I didn't recognize. <break time="350ms"/>I don't want to go back there.
